docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,800.00 FILED BY HUYNH, MONICA AS TO DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, PRISCILA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2020 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2020 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO FEB-18-2020 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF MONICA HUYNH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRISCILA QUITIERREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 18, 2020 AT 3:30 P.M. DEPARTMENT 506 (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2020 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF MONICA HUYNH IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT PRISCILA GUTIERREZ IS NOT PRESENT. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUYNH, MONICA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GUTIERREZ, PRISCILA $4,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,850.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
